title: Mezco One:12 Collective Superman (2025) Action Figure
description: Mezco's Superman comes with Krypto, 28 points of articulation, four head portraits, and a posing wire cape. McFarlane's costs less. It also looks like it.

title: Mezco One:12 Collective The Dark Knight Batman Action Figure
description: Swappable facial expressions on a masked Batman. Three lower face plates, three eye pieces, unmasked Bale portrait. Every belt pouch opens.

title: Mezco One:12 Collective Sin City Marv Action Figure
description: Three head sculpts, real fabric trench coat, and an accessory list that reads like a crime scene inventory. Mezco doesn't chase obvious IPs.

title: Mezco One:12 Collective Nightcrawler Action Figure
description: Fully tailored X-Men combat suit, bendy wire tail, teleportation smoke effects. The single best argument for what soft goods do at this scale.

title: Mezco One:12 Collective The Dark Knight Joker Action Figure
description: Four Heath Ledger head sculpts. Four layers of real fabric. Sixteen interchangeable hands. The reason people take One:12 seriously.

title: Mezco One:12 Collective TMNT Shredder Action Figure
description: Metallic armor plating that catches light differently than painted plastic. Removable helmet reveals Oroku Saki. One of the best entry points into One:12.

title: Star Wars The Black Series Gaming Greats Kyle Katarn 6-Inch Action Figure
description: Kyle Katarn finally gets a Black Series figure. The Gaming Greats line brings the Dark Forces protagonist to life for collectors who've been waiting since the 90s.

title: Star Wars: The Black Series Maul 6-Inch Action Figure

title: Star Wars: The Black Series Rook Kast 6-Inch Action Figure

title: Star Wars: The Black Series Devon Izara 6-Inch Action Figure

title: Gundam Barbatos 4th Form with Boomerang Mace Metal Build Action Figure
description: The Metal Build Barbatos is heavy. Die-cast frame, crimson cloth cape, tight joints. If IBO is your series, this is the definitive Barbatos.

title: Nu Gundam Perfect Grade Unleashed 1:60 Scale Model Kit
description: Bandai Hobby's flagship kit for Gunpla's 45th anniversary. Nearly a foot tall, multi-colored metallic inner frame, light-emitting face parts. 40+ hours to build.

title: Freedom Gundam Concept 2 Metal Build Action Figure - Reissue
